acceptance_criteria.criterion: shortlist returns a bounded candidate topic list (not the full catalog)
uses a cheap embedding/BM25 pre-filter against SearchCandidates
covered_by: BM25 implementation exercised by relevance-ranking tests

acceptance_criteria.criterion: relevant fixture topics included ahead of irrelevant ones
